pi_items.source: Task instructions and Oracle Analytics Desktop default workbook extension
Task instructions to save in Documents folder for default Docker user profile
Task instructions explicitly requesting a Sankey visualization
Task instructions and matching column names in sample_order_lines2023.xlsx
Analysis of data file sample_order_lines2023.xlsx which contains 'Quantity Ordered' instead of 'Quantity'
Task instructions requiring the title 'Order Priority Flow Analysis'

privileged_info_summary: The objective is to create a Sankey Diagram named 'Logistics_Flow.dva' in Oracle Analytics Desktop and save it in the Documents folder. The dataset contains synthetic order data. Note that while the instructions mention the data is in 'Documents/Data', the environment actually provisions the data at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx'. The chart must map the dimensions 'Order Priority', 'Ship Mode', and 'Customer Segment', and use the measure 'Quantity Ordered' (referred to as 'Quantity' or 'Order Quantity' in the instructions). The chart title should include 'Flow Analysis'.
